I don't like their snipping at their opponent or take advantage of any slips by their opponent to the detriment of the country. I don't like some of their philosophical positions, short-sighted for the immediate advantage. I don't like their playing to the gallery. Saying what they think people want to hear on issues particular groups wants to hear.

I like the fact that they focus on, bring our attention to issues overlooked by the other party. Also they focus on the underprivileged. I think they have attractive candidates, attractive personalities and public rapport.

All that I said about the Dems. I'm in strong opposition to their official party platform about abortion. I don't like their self-conscience identification as conservatives and their having to knuckle down to the right wing.

I like some of their top leadership. Their image is of very responsible, sober people. I refuse to say conservative because I don't like that work. I like their long-range views. They have a firm grasp on economics. I just hope they know more than I do.
Policies are to leaning to far left.
